chapter_title.en: The Exclusive Honors that Allah has Reserved for the Believers

text: 79 - وعن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام أنه قال: كما لا ينفع مع الشرك شئ، فلا يضر مع الايمان شئ.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 79. It has been reported that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said: Just as there is nothing to gain from polytheism, there is nothing to lose with faith
